meaning: 里窝那[意大利西部港市](或译利伏诺)
examples: Belleri is considering an offer from Livorno.
Livorno keeper Marco Amelia has revealed his desire to join Roma one day.
Livorno have approached Juventus over the availability of defender Igor Tudor.
Livorno players and officials rushed to hospital, where they were told their teammate had passed away.
The match was abandoned with Livorno leading 2-0, and the other players left the field in tears.
